entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 63,645Chapters: 10/16Kudos: 460

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: Heatwave
entry.summary:
Author: HawthorneWren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,779Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 89

Summary: As Gotham swelters under a relentless summer heatwave, Jason Todd struggles to readjust to life at Wayne Manor, back under Bruce’s rules and back among family. The edges of it are starting to feel familiar again, but something between him and Dick Grayson has shifted, and as hot summer days fade into warm nights, the line between comfort and something deeper begins to blur.

entry.title: seven days at wayne mansions
entry.summary:
Author: almostnowandthen

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,002Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 110

Summary: Dick, Jason and Tim spend a week in Wayne Mansions in Monte Carlo with Bruce. Except, they're not here on vacation; they're here to Agatha Christie the shit out of their dad, who has, unfortunately, been cloned into multiple near-indistinguishable copies by an interdimensional doppelganger, and it's up to them to find the real Bruce Wayne before time runs out. It's a good thing that they're all professional vigilantes, who would never let their reckless sexual affairs, ongoing commitment issues, or poor parental relationships get in the way of getting the job done.

entry.title: Boxed Cocksleeve
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,572Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 112

Summary: When he was inside the box, Jason couldn’t see, couldn’t move, could barely breathe. If he had an itch, he couldn’t scratch it (Jason hadn’t gotten a good scratch ever since getting his limbs removed). All he had were the dildos and vibrators stuffed in his holes and swelling up his womb, rubbing and rolling and sparking endless torturous pain against his sore innards, pressurizing him without ever getting him off. And with all his limbs gone, Jason couldn’t rub himself off, couldn’t do anything to alleviate the pain. His body modifications ensured Dick held the privilege to his every bodily function—orgasms, lactation, bathroom privilege, and even slick production. Jason was Dick’s little toy, and so he was for Dick to torture and to play with. But Dick has decided to remove Jason from the box today, which means Dick wants to play. Which also means Jason might just be lucky enough to be allowed an orgasm today.

entry.title: [Podfic] The Pieces of What's Left
entry.summary:
Author: Vox_la (Era_Penn)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: OP Summary: When Blockbuster burns down his whole life and Tarantula takes what isn't hers to claim, Dick ditches his life, his name, and his city for an anonymous, quiet life in the Bowery. Just till he can put himself back together. Jason is doing his best to fix his corner of the city, keep Black Mask out of his business, and arrange a confrontation with Batman, the Joker, and all the water under the bridge. He has no idea what to do with a Dick Grayson who's apparently in hiding and joined his gang by accident. But it turns out they need each other far more than they could have imagined, and if either of them are going to fix their broken pieces, it's going to have to be together.

entry.title: Aquila
entry.summary:
Author: Nightshade_Nectar

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,432Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 85

Summary: Dick blinks. "You want me," he tilts his throat to better bare the purpling handprint to Jason's sight, "to pass this off as a hickey?" Jason just huffs, tapping the grainy picture on the tabloid's cover. "No, Dick. I'm saying you could pass this off as a collection of hickeys. Unless you have a better idea, that is."

entry.title: Shot Through the Heart
entry.summary:
Author: SaviouroftheStars

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,518Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 193

Summary: Jason Todd died once. It didn’t stick. Now a revenant with a stuttering heartbeat and a soul that won’t stay buried, he hunts the things that crawl out of the dark. But nothing he’s fought, not demons, not ghosts, not monsters wearing human skin, comes close to the pair now stalking the hunter circuit. They’re carving through veteran hunters like wheat. One is a towering brute in a mask.The other is a beautiful, shackled young man whose presence feels like gravity—quiet, strange, and impossible to ignore. Every instinct Jason has screams danger. Something about him feels ancient, bound, wrong. And yet Jason can’t look away. He’s going to have to kill them both. He just wishes the pretty one wasn’t making the job so damn complicated.

entry.summary:

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,393Chapters: 8/14Kudos: 452

It’s why it isn’t all that surprising that he wakes up from a blackout stupor to the staggering realization that he’s slept with his not-quite-brother and crush-for-forever. He expects it to be a big deal. It's not.

entry.title: i need a human's touch (but you don't need me)
entry.summary:
Author: Caoxytocin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,805Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 53

Summary: "Cya, stranger!" Robin calls before flipping off with a twist of yellow. The strange boy flies to the next building, and Jason watches him leave with pursed lips. Then he closes the window, pulling the curtains shut. There were a lot of shouldn'ts Jason had done in his life, most of which he wasn't sure whether he regretted it or not. Like how he shouldn't have opened that window, and met boy wonder.

entry.title: Tired Stars
entry.summary:
Author: ResidentJazz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,183Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 497

Summary: Dick Grayson has always known how to smile on command, how to play the part people expect — even when it tears him apart. After a public breakdown and a mission that pushes him past his limits, Bruce’s disappointment feels like another verdict he can’t escape. But Jason refuses to let him spiral alone. In the quiet of a safe house, between coffee that tastes like ash, late-night movies, and the weight of a case too close to home, Dick has to confront the question he’s never dared to ask: who is he when he isn’t what Bruce made him? One step at a time, he’ll have to find out.

entry.title: guess i need you (in a way that really scares me)
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,187Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 45

Summary: Tim recognized—in what could only be considered a moment of lucidity outside the haze of horniness that washed over him in the moment—how fucked it was to make himself a piece of a moment not meant for him. He walked the walk of shame all the way to the shower, blasting himself with ice cold water. He couldn't even believe he'd done that; couldn't believe that he'd made himself a passive audience member in the sexual exploits of people he cared about without their permission. Perving on Dick, Jason, and Roy through a crack in the study door was a new low. He'd be thoroughly mortified if he was found out by either one of them.or: Jason, Dick, and Roy are non-monogamous soulmates and aren't discreet about it. Tim doesn't seem to mind all that much, to be honest.

entry.title: Blind Faith
entry.summary:
Author: dreamingvanity

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 270,981Chapters: 36/?Kudos: 241

Summary: It's no one's fault but his own that Dick is sitting there now, cold and utterly miserable, and very close to freezing to death. It's no one's fault but his own that he let his heart and mind get away again. It's no one's fault but his own that he wanted for someone who couldn't and wouldn't be his, and Wally is right. Dick needs to get back to his life, start over and make new friends. That's all, nothing more and nothing less. Friends, Dick needs friends, and sadly (according to Wally), Krypto isn't enough.

entry.title: Birds of Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Castle53

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,882Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Jason Todd was expecting an interesting year. He wasn't expecting his entire past to be thrown into his lap, but what can you do? Dick's been missing for two years. Even he doesn't know where he was. But he killed them all. Tim never thought of Bruce as a good father, but he never thought the man would stoop this far. Roy wants to get out of heroism, thank you very much. Arthur Fleck started the year with one adopted son, and now he's got four. Fantastic.

entry.title: You are precious to me.
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_dreamy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 171,317Chapters: 64/64Kudos: 395

Summary: Damian had been sexually assaulted and after that his father saw the video, he just want to run away. That is how he end up living with Dick. Dick is conflicated about his feelings for Jason. Damian is now under his care and him and Bruce are still awkward around each other. And something is up with Tim but he doesn't know what. Jason is waiting for Dick to give him a proper answer. His hate for Bruce is too strong and he do not feel welcome in their perfect little family. or Everyone is dealing with things and their family is slowly falling appart. Would they succeed to all get along and get over the mistakes of the past?

Summary: Jason's been feeling squirmy in his stomach for a couple of days now. Bruce says that Dick's supposed to help, but Jason really doesn't see how Dick will help him at all.
